## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` file.
- [ ] My suggested resource is free (or very low cost) and highly impactful.
- [ ] I have updated BOTH `README.md` (Greek) and `README_EN.md` (English).
- [ ] The description of the resource is short and actionable.
